ai_role: HBM and advanced memory for AI accelerators
tvs_tiebreaker: Treat as a cyclical AI bottleneck: TVS and valuation can support adds, but do not classify as core monopoly infrastructure.
technical_timing_rule: Technical and macro timing matter heavily; prefer SETUP or STRONG_SETUP for adds.
rationale: HBM is necessary for AI scaling and inference can increase memory intensity, but memory pricing and supply expansion remain cyclical.
